allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command "netsh advfirewall firewall show rule name='My Apps Server Port 80'" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "
\\$job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { & 'C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\node.exe' 'C:\\SERVER\\server.js' 2>&1 }
Start-Sleep -Seconds 3
Receive-Job -Job \\$job
netstat -ano | findstr ':3000'
")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Command cloudflared -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source; Get-Command pm2 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source")
Bash(powershell -Command "& 'C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\cloudflared\\cloudflared.exe' tunnel route dns yannickmorgans yannickmorgans.ca 2>&1")
Bash(powershell -Command "& 'C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\cloudflared\\cloudflared.exe' tunnel route dns yannickmorgans www.yannickmorgans.ca 2>&1")
Bash(powershell -Command "& npm run --prefix C:\\SERVER start 2>&1; pm2 start 'C:\\SERVER\\server.js' --name 'apps-server' 2>&1; pm2 save 2>&1")
Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-Service cloudflared -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Status, StartType")
Bash(cmd /c "sc query type= all | findstr cloudflared")

Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "
\\$action = New-ScheduledTaskAction -Execute 'C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\cloudflared\\cloudflared.exe' -Argument 'tunnel --config C:\\SERVER\\cloudflared-config.yml run'
\\$trigger = New-ScheduledTaskTrigger -AtStartup
\\$settings = New-ScheduledTaskSettingsSet -AllowStartIfOnBatteries -DontStopIfGoingOnBatteries -ExecutionTimeLimit 0 -RestartCount 3 -RestartInterval \(New-TimeSpan -Minutes 1\)
\\$principal = New-ScheduledTaskPrincipal -UserId 'SYSTEM' -LogonType ServiceAccount -RunLevel Highest
Register-ScheduledTask -TaskName 'CloudflaredTunnel' -Action \\$action -Trigger \\$trigger -Settings \\$settings -Principal \\$principal -Force
" 2>&1)

Bash(cmd /c "schtasks /create /tn CloudflaredTunnel /tr \\"\\\\\\"C:\\\\Program Files \(x86\)\\\\cloudflared\\\\cloudflared.exe\\\\\\" tunnel --config \\\\\\"C:\\\\SERVER\\\\cloudflared-config.yml\\\\\\" run\\" /sc onstart /ru SYSTEM /rl HIGHEST /f 2>&1")

Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "
\\$startupFolder = [Environment]::GetFolderPath\('Startup'\)
\\$shell = New-Object -ComObject WScript.Shell
\\$shortcut = \\$shell.CreateShortcut\(\\"\\$startupFolder\\CloudflaredServer.lnk\\"\)
\\$shortcut.TargetPath = 'C:\\SERVER\\autostart.bat'
\\$shortcut.WorkingDirectory = 'C:\\SERVER'
\\$shortcut.WindowStyle = 7
\\$shortcut.Save\(\)
Write-Host \\"Shortcut created at: \\$startupFolder\\CloudflaredServer.lnk\\"
")

Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
Write-Host 'Fetching latest Minecraft version...'
\\$manifest = Invoke-RestMethod 'https://launchermeta.mojang.com/mc/game/version_manifest_v2.json'
\\$latestId = \\$manifest.latest.release
\\$versionMeta = \(\\$manifest.versions | Where-Object { \\$_.id -eq \\$latestId }\)[0]
\\$versionJson = Invoke-RestMethod \\$versionMeta.url
\\$jarUrl = \\$versionJson.downloads.server.url
Write-Host \\"Latest version: \\$latestId\\"
Write-Host \\"Jar URL: \\$jarUrl\\"
" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "
Write-Host 'Downloading Java 21 \(Temurin JRE\)...'
\\$javaUrl = 'https://github.com/adoptium/temurin21-binaries/releases/download/jdk-21.0.5%2B11/OpenJDK21U-jre_x64_windows_hotspot_21.0.5_11.msi'
\\$out = 'C:\\MINECRAFT\\java21.msi'
Invoke-WebRequest -Uri \\$javaUrl -OutFile \\$out -UseBasicParsing
Write-Host 'Download complete.'
" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "
Write-Host 'Installing Java 21 silently...'
Start-Process msiexec.exe -ArgumentList '/i C:\\MINECRAFT\\java21.msi /qn ADDLOCAL=FeatureMain' -Wait
Remove-Item 'C:\\MINECRAFT\\java21.msi' -Force
Write-Host 'Java 21 installed.'
" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/api/climbs2' -Headers @{Authorization='Bearer test'} -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host $r.StatusCode; Write-Host $r.Content.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(300,$r.Content.Length\)\) } catch { Write-Host $_.Exception.Message }")

Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id 13280 -Force; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; Start-Process -FilePath 'C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\node.exe' -ArgumentList 'C:/SERVER/server.js' -WorkingDirectory 'C:\\SERVER' -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/' -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).StatusCode")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Content C:\\SERVER\\data\\sessions.json | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -First 3 | Select-Object userId, createdAt, expiresAt")

Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Name cloudflared -Force; Start-Sleep 2; Start-Process 'C:\\SERVER\\cloudflared.exe' -ArgumentList 'tunnel --config C:\\SERVER\\cloudflared-config.yml run' -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep 3; Get-Process cloudflared | Select-Object Id,Name" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "Start-Process -FilePath 'C:\\\\SERVER\\\\cloudflared.exe' -ArgumentList 'tunnel','--config','C:\\\\SERVER\\\\cloudflared-config.yml','run' -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep 4; \\$p = Get-Process cloudflared -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \(\\$p\) { Write-Host 'cloudflared running, PID:' \\$p.Id } else { Write-Host 'cloudflared NOT running' }" 2>&1)
Bash(powershell -NonInteractive -Command "Get-Process cloudflared | Stop-Process -Force; Write-Host 'Killed all cloudflared processes'" 2>&1)
